language.entry: The girl I loved so very, very much...
The melina weaves and ripostes through enemy attacks with her deft steps and skillful strikes.
Like umblemished military uniform, the melina puts practicality at the top of her list. The two revolvers that stay at her sides are lightweight yet reliable, standing ready at all times.

The melina comes second to none when it comes to camping. She sacrifices her sleep to stand guard, checks nearby surroundings with her binoculars, and sometimes uses narcotics to keep fear away from her allies.
A wolf-like woman knocked on the door to the hamlet, cleaned of the scent of blood.
A wolf-like woman knocked on the door to the hamlet, cleaned of the scent of blood.
Feel free to sleep, everyone. I'll be standing guard.
You'll feel good real soon. Good night, sweetheart.
Ease up a little, lads. I'll be scouting ahead.
Right. Let's carry on with whatever I have left.
What is a life full of losses worth?
I should have died instead of her...!
Even with all the blood shed, it proves nothing...
I don't want to lose anyone ever again.
We can go on. Commencing battle.
I can't fall like this. My fight isn't over yet.
We will break their ranks! Follow my lead!
I wouldn' be able to face her if I die here.
I'll struggle till the very end! I'd hate to die at a place like this!
No need for fear. The only ones falling here are them.
If it bleeds, we can kill it. The same goes for bullets.
No need to think too deep-you attack, the enemies fall. That's all.
Don't think about anything else. Keep your mind on felling the enemy before you.
There's still things I have to do.
Everyone dies. There's no exception to that.
If I die like this, maybe I can get some peace of mind...
We may live today, but there's no guarentee that it'll be the same tomorrow.
If I died back then, I wouldn't be suffering like this...
It seems like an inadequate choice to rest right now.
We're not on a field trip.
Even if we scrape by, day by day, eventually we'll...
I'll catch their eyes. After all, a half-assed life isn't worth living.
What's left for me after all this fighting?
Ha, leave me to my fate if you want to retreat.
Erk...! Dammit! This is why you couldn't save her back then, you useless bitch!
*Rough breathing* Are you still afraid of dying? Hm? *Continues ruminating*
Damn it! I could've been free!
Why don't you flee? No need to stand out like that.
You want to die with me? Move your ass to the back!
Flee if you know what's good for ya.
Go home if you're not prepared for the battlefield.
Hah, you think you'll be as lucky next time? Count your prayers.
You're fine this time, but when it happens again....
It's happening! Somebody's going to die again!
Everyone's drawn to the dark-like moths to a flame, knowing full well they'll die.
Hah, seeing that you're stepping out of line, I can assure you that you won't live for much longer.
That is not a suitable command.
I will not use something that has not been verified.
You expect me to use non-military grade supplies?
Fuck! I should've seen that coming! Stupid bitch!
I should've figured this would be here! Idiot sandwich!
Don't you dare touch these things without my command from now on.
You DARE touch that?! You don't even know what it could possibly do!
Hey, you look like you're out of breath.
It's almost a waste to use bullets on you.
No need to nag. You'll all have your turns.
You have yet to see me attack, no?
You'll be back alive and well. Don't fret over it.
Worry not. It's all going according to plan.
If we act as planned, there won't be much in our way.
Hang on, show me your wounds.
First aid is mandatory in all the training regimens for good reason.
Everything will go smoothly today, at the very least.
I'll teach you a breathing technique if you're feeling anxious. There's training for all kinds of things.
It's all going according to plan. Till now, at least.
Of all the days...Ruby, why do I miss you more today?
*Sounds of checking ammo. The ammo gives off a nice sound.*
I said I don't need it.
I'm not interested in rolling the dice.
...I tend not to believe in gods.
I'm fine with my portion. Share it with the others.
This time, I'll be protecting you!
Damn! I can't hold on for much longer!
...!! I am sorry! Damn, playing petty tricks on me...!
My head...my head feels all fuzzy.
Shit, it's heavy...! I can't break out!
You waste your orders like THIS?!
Wait, can't you guys hear something from the ceiling?
...! I have a bad feeling about this..!
I have a bad feeling about this...
Dammit! Everyone, return to your ranks!
Getting so weak...from something like this...
*Sigh of relief*...Now this is more like it!
Darn, the thirst..I'm so thirsty...I need the blood...!
Damn it, my thirst for the blood only gets worse...
Haah...now I can breathe easy again.
AHAHA! OUT OF MY WAY! YOU'RE ALL JUST NUISANCES!
Damn it...! Get your ass away from me!
AHAHAHAHA! I HAVEN'T BEEN THIS HAPPY IN A LONG TIME!
I'm losing my mind! I swear I'm not a vampire!
DON'T STOP ME NOW! I'M HAVING A GOOD TIME!
I don't need anything else, just the blood, please...!
You think that'll satiisfy my cravings?
HA! NO NEED FOR THAT! KILL THEM AND TAKE THIR BLOOD!
Damn it, you're going to slow my bloodlust! Stop it!
OUT OF MY WAY! I SMELL BLOOD THERE!
DARN! THAT MUST HURT! LET ME LICK YOUR WOUNDS LATER!
...your blood doesn't smell all that bad.
NOPE! I DO WHAT I WANT!
That doesn't seem like a good decision.
AHAHAHA! KILL THEM ALL! BLOOD FOR THE BLOOD GOD!
Hey, do you really not have space for me?
Damn it, don't die on me!
My veins feel like it's on fire..!
Haah...my heart feels like it's bursting.
Are there no torniquets around here?
Now this is the oasis in the batlefield.
There's light to be found, even here, in the dark.
Well, nothing is better than something happening.
So what's the strongest drink around here? Gimme that.
Give me the whole bottle. I have much to forget...
Play any tricks, and you won't live to tell the tale.
Gambling...maybe I should loosen up a little.
You over there. Yeah, you. You're looking mighty fine. Come with me.
Bring me the finest girl here. Even better if they have long hair.
Hah...I suppose I could use some time to think.
The silence isn't all that bad.
Believer or not, you will find reasons to pray.
This kind of...uncilized behavior-ehem, excuse me. Doeos this really make me feel better
I don't have this kind of kink. ...what? What do you mean blasphemy?
Hey, hang on. Is that proper medicine? Why are you tying my hands?!
You can't just just remedy things that aren't properly proven to be safe!
Wait, do you even know what "Sanitation" means?
Don't touch my wound with your bare hands! What's with the hook?!
Gah, give me a drink already.
I don't need prostitutes, I need a beer!
You dare trap me in a place like this!
God did nothing to help me before, but this drink will help with my thirst.
Hey, you know there's better things up there.
What do you expect me to do here, of all places?
I have no interest in S&M.
Drinks aren't bad, but ladies? That's where the cash is.
Not here. Juuust past the door and to the brothel...hm?
You can't possibly believe in a god.
Provided you have a girl come in with me.
I have no interest in dice.
You telling me to kiss a prostitute?
Look-we all have our kinks. But this isn't for me.
Nope. You guys have your fun.
The room below. It's time to send our prayers.
Not now. I wish to pray.
Uh...I think we got the wrong door. The leather club's two rooms down.
...Is the room next to us ready for use?
I'll be fine without a drink.
Ehem...I got a bit too invested last time.
I don't like a silent place like this.
These prayers aren't worth shit. It doesn't help you live longer.
You guys can do the praying.
You think this kinky stuf is for me?
I'm sure you need militaristic help. Even just a vanguard might help.
I can lead the charge. How does that sound?
Again, I've managed to live again...
Ready for battle. I'm prepared to deploy at any time.
The people here ain't all that bad. Their eyes are pure.
Hey, when's the next quest? I'll embark any day.
I'm ready. Call me when you need.
I can handle it. When's the next quest?
I'm ready. One more run can't hurt.
Damn it. I swear I'm fine. I've been through worse.
...I told you I was fine. What's with that stare?
So, when I was in the bureau...
Hang on a second, that dice sounds weird.
No need to act up. Leave the men to the others-play with me instead.
...I don't know how to pray like the others. It's fine, right?
Oh, hell! This is worse than the POW camp!
Shit! What I'd give to go back to Altana's field hospital!
Is that treatment proven to be true? Hey, wait up..! What's with the leeches!
Now this is more like it. The town may be a shithole, but the bar's all right.
Hit. Another hit. You ain't playing with the cards, are ya?
Come here, sissy. It's your first time with a woman? It's okay. I'll be gentle.
Ha...I didn't expect myself to look for god here.
Wait. This is practically a suicide mission. You tryin' to kill me?
I can't go on a reckless mission like this. At least a few would die.
Damn it, we aren't prepared for this! The supplies or the equipment or whatnot!
This is a waste of our forces. I trust that you will make a better choice.
Your blind? This is clearly a waste of our forces.
Oi. What do you think we'll do here? The real enemy's over there.
I'll be investigating this thoroughly. I promise I'll give it back...
This may be dangerous. I'll keep it.
Keep your eyes open. We'll make it back alive, I swear.
You have it in your eyes. Keep it up.
Ha...it's okay now. Not bad at all.
I'm doing well. It's looking up.
Much better. Things are looking up.
We'll be back in no time.
Not bad, everyone. You've got the spirit.
Warriors from these lands ain't half bad.
Keep your eyes peeled for anything.
Keep in mind that retreating is an option.
The fire fades. It did it's due dilligence. Not a bad night overall.
We're running low on provisions. Keep that in mind as we go on.
Whoever's on provision duty, you're doing good. I could kiss you.
You're all doing well. Getting back won't be a problem.
Damn it. I've seen what I shouldn't have...
Wait, your face...! Am I seeing things..?
So this is the strongest evil we face. I have a bad feeling about this.
If it's an order, I will follow it. Had to be done anyways.
I'll write a thorough report on that place. After all, it's undocumented.
I can't see a feet infront of me. Keep your ears open and eyes peeled.
It's much better with the radiance.
I didn't expect the torch to come in as so useful.
가벼운 걸음과 예리한 일격을 겸비한 사명의 잔불는, 적의 공격을 흘려내며 그 틈을 치명적인 반격으로 응수합니다.
흐트러짐 없는 군복을 걸친 사명의 잔불는 실용성을 중시합니다. 그녀의 곁을 지키는 두 정의 리볼버는 무겁지 않으면서도 확실하며, 언제나 신속한 대응을 보장합니다.
사명의 잔불는 야영에서 누구보다도 철저히 임무를 수행합니다. 스스로를 희생해 경계를 서고, 쌍안경으로 주변을 살피며, 간혹 강력한 진통제로 공포를 잊게 해주기도 합니다.
피 냄새를 지운 채, 늑대 같은 낯선 여인이 영지의 문을 두드렸습니다.
피 냄새를 지운 채, 늑대 같은 낯선 여인이 영지의 문을 두드렸습니다.
모두 마음 놓고 자라고. 내가 불침번을 설테니.
조금 기다리면 편해질거야. 좋은 꿈 꾸라고.
쉬고 있어. 난 정찰을 좀 하고 오지.
그때, 차라리 내가 대신 죽어야 했는데...!
흘려온 피조차, 결국엔 헛된 증명일 뿐인가...
아직 할 수 있어. 전투를 속행한다.
쓰러질 수 없어. 내 싸움은 아직 끝나지 않았으니까.
이런 데서 죽어서는 그녀를 볼 면목이 없거든.
계속 발버둥쳐주지! 이런 곳에서 죽을 수는 없으니 말이야!
두려워 할 필요 없어. 여기서 쓰러지는 건 저 녀석들이다.
총알이 박힌다는건 죽일 수 있다는거지. 논리적으로 말이야.
별거 아니야. 네가 공격하고, 적은 쓰러진다. 그뿐이지.
다른 생각 하지 마. 눈앞의 적을 쓰러트리는 것만 생각해.
사람은 모두 죽어. 그 누구도 예외는 없어.
이대로 쓰러진다면, 조금은 편해질 수 있을까....
오늘 너희가 살아남더라도, 내일도 그럴 거라는 보장은 없어.
그때, 그대로 죽었더라면 이렇게 괴롭지 않았을텐데....
지금 휴식을 취하는 것은 적절하지 않아 보이는군.
내가 시선을 끌지. 어차피 죽다 만 목숨이니.
이 싸움 끝에 대체 뭐가 있지?
하, 퇴각하고 싶다면 나를 두고 후퇴해.
윽...! 젠장! 이따위니까 그 때 못 지킨 거야, 이 모자란 년!
*거친 숨소리...* 아직도 죽는게 두려워? 응? *계속되는 혼잣말*
어설프게 전장에 뛰어들지 말고 집으로 돌아가.
하, 다음에도 멀쩡할 것 같아? 죽는 거 한순간이야.
또야! 또다시 누군가 죽고 말 거야!
다들 죽을 걸 알면서도 그렇게 어둠 속으로 기어들어 가는 거지.
하, 멋모르고 설치다 다치는 꼴을 보니 오래 살진 못하겠군.
젠장! 내가 더 똑바로 봐야 했는데! 쓸모없는 년!
내가 더 잘 구분해 내야 했는데! 멍청한 년!
앞으로 이런 것에 함부로 손대려 하지 마라.
함부로 만지다니! 얼마나 위험할 줄 알고!
내가 공격하는 걸 못 봤군. 그렇지?
넌 반드시 살아 돌아갈거야. 걱정하지 마.
너무 걱정하지 마. 작전대로 되어가고 있으니까.
작전대로 움직이면, 큰 사고는 안 날 거다.
적어도 오늘은 별 탈 없이 지나갈 거다.
긴장된다면, 효과적인 호흡법을 알려주지. 이런 훈련도 있거든.
내 몫은 됐어. 다른 이에게 나눠줘.
잠깐, 천장에서 무슨 소리 들리지 않았어?
이런, 갈증이.. 갈증이 심각해... 피, 피가 필요해...!
날 방해하지 마! 난 지금 엄청나게 기분이 좋다고!
그런건 필요 없으니, 피를 좀 달라고...!
그런걸 먹어서 배가 찰 것 같나?
하! 필요 없어! 적을 죽이고 피를 취하면 돼!
뭐, 별 일 없다는 것은 좋은 일이지.
여기서 가장 독한 술이 어느거지? 일단 가져와 봐.
그래. 다 가져와. 잊고 싶은 일이 한가득이야.
속임수를 썼다간, 머리통이 날아갈 줄 알라고.
거기 너. 그래. 예쁘게 생겼군. 이리 와.
여기서 제일 예쁜 아가씨를 데려와. 머리가 길면 더 좋고.
하... 그래. 생각할 시간이 조금 필요했어.
신을 믿지 않아도 기도는 하게 되더군.
이..런 미개한 방법으로.. 크흠 실례. ...이런 것으로 정말로 기분이 나아지는건가?
어이, 잠깐. 그거 검증된 방법이 맞아? 손은 왜 묶는건데?
젠장! 이런 민간요법을 그렇게 당당하게 행해도 되는건가!
젠장! 맨 손으로 상처에 손 대지 마! 갈고리는 왜 가져오는거야!
젠장, 창녀를 사는 취미는 없다고. 술이나 가져와!
신은 무언가 해결해 준 적이 없지. 대신 술은 이 갈증을 확실하게 해결해주지.
이봐. 이거 말고 더 즐거운게 있잖아.
이런 텅 빈 공간에서 뭘 하라는거야?
술도 나쁘지 않지만, 여자가 없다면 아무것도 안 돼.
여기 말고, 옆 방으로 가자고. 응?
예쁜 여자 한 명 같이 넣어주면 들어가도록 하지.
아니, 좀 더 조용한 곳이 필요해.
옆 방으로 가지. 기도를 올려야 해.
그... 여기 말고 좀 더 가자고.
난 술 없이도 버틸 수 있어.
이런 기도는 하등 쓸모가 없어. 어차피 닿지 않거든.
이런 미개한 방식이 통할 것 같나.
내가 선봉장이 되어 줄 수 있는데. 어때?
전투 준비 완료. 언제든 출동 가능해.
분위기가 썩 괜찮군. 다들 좋은 눈이야.
이봐. 다음 출정은 언제지? 나를 데려가라고.
뭐, 견딜만 해. 다음 출정은 언제지?
준비 됐어. 다시 한 번 갈 수 있어.
제길. 아직 문제 없어. 더 한 것도 겪어봤다고.
...문제 없다니까 그러네. 뭐야? 그 눈. 왜 그렇게 쳐다봐?
그래... 내가 관리국에 있었을 때 말이야...
이봐 잠깐, 주사위 굴리는 소리가 이상한데?
긴장하지 마. 남자같이 섬세하지 못한 것들은 제쳐두고, 나랑 놀아 보자고.
... 이 곳 기도문은 잘 모르는데. 상관 없지?
그 치료법, 검증된 것 맞아? 어어..! 거머리는 왜 들고오는거야!
제길! 그 메스, 제대로 소독 된 것 맞지?!
한 장 교환. 아니, 두 장. 잠깐, 방금 밑장 뺀 거 아니지?
이리 와, 아가씨. 여자랑은 처음인가? 괜찮아. 힘 빼. 거칠게 다루진 않을테니.
하아... 내가 신을 찾게 될 줄이야.
잠깐, 이건 거의 자살임무인데. 날 죽일 셈인가?
이런 무모한 작전에 어울릴 수는 없어. 분명 몇 명 죽어서 돌아올걸.
젠장, 이곳에 가기엔 아직 준비가 모자라다고! 장비도, 물자도!
이건 전력 낭비다. 좀 더 현명한 판단을 바라지.
네 눈은 옹이구멍인가? 이건 명백한 전력 낭비야.
어이. 이런 데서 뭘 하겠다는 거야? 적진은 저쪽이라고.
이건 내가 개인적으로 조사 한 뒤에 돌려주도록 하지.
정신 차려. 살아 돌아갈 수 있어.
하아... 좀 살 것 같군. 나쁘지 않아.
난 아직 멀쩡해. 상황이 나쁘지 않다는 뜻이지.
좀 낫군. 상황이 나쁘지 않게 굴러가고 있어.
제길, 난 아직 괜찮아. 신경쓰지 마.
이대로만 가면 별 탈 없이 돌아가겠군.
정신 똑바로 차리라고. 할 수 있는 것 부터 해.
이상한 생각 하지마. 눈 앞의 문제에 집중해.
사상자가 나오기 전에, 퇴각하는 것도 염두에 두라고.
장작불이 꺼져가는군. 뭐, 제 역할은 다 했지. 나쁘지 않은 밤이야.
보급품이 얼마 남지 않았어. 남은 것들을 고려해서 진군하자고.
보급 담당이 누구인진 모르겠지만, 상당히 유능하군. 키스라도 해주고 싶어.
다들 잘하고 있어. 이대로 가면 무사히 귀환할 수 있을걸.
이곳이 가장 깊은 작전구역인가. 불안한 예감이 드는데.
명령이라면 따르도록 하지. 어차피 언젠가는 가야 했으니까.
다녀오면 보고서를 꼼꼼하게 작성하도록 하지. 미지의 영역이니.
젠장, 한 치 앞도 안 보이는군. 다들 귀를 열고 소리를 잘 듣도록 해.
밝으니 좀 낫네. 기습당할 일은 없겠어.
